name: the-four-steps-to-the-epiphany
description: Steve Blank's The Four Steps to the Epiphany — apply the Customer Development model to replace traditional product development: find customers before building, validate demand, create a market, and build a scalable company
useCase: Helps entrepreneurs and product teams validate business ideas before building, find product-market fit, get first customers, and build scalable companies using the Customer Development framework.
knownRisks: The Customer Development model requires getting out of the building — it's time-intensive but essential
